items.name: Princes parkrun
items.notes: Free timed 5k every Saturday 9am, Princes Park (L8). The friendliest way to meet people as a newcomer.

items.name: Sefton Park parkrun
items.notes: Free timed 5k every Saturday 9am, Sefton Park (L17). Huge post-run coffee scene at Lark Lane.

items.name: Croxteth Hall parkrun
items.notes: Free timed 5k every Saturday 9am through Croxteth country park.

items.name: Birkenhead parkrun
items.notes: Free timed 5k every Saturday 9am in Birkenhead Park — the park that inspired Central Park, NYC.

items.name: New Brighton parkrun
items.notes: Free timed 5k every Saturday 9am along the Marine Lake / promenade. Flat and fast.

items.name: Liverpool Running Club
items.notes: Big social running club, multiple weekly sessions from the city centre. All paces welcome.

items.name: Penny Lane Striders
items.notes: Friendly south-Liverpool running club, runs from the Penny Lane / Wavertree area.

items.name: Wirral AC
items.notes: Wirral's main athletics & running club, based at Bebington Oval.

items.name: Anfield (Liverpool FC)
items.notes: The Kop. Even non-football people should do the stadium tour once.

items.name: Hill Dickinson Stadium (Everton FC)
items.notes: Everton's new waterfront stadium at Bramley-Moore Dock — the city's newest landmark.

items.name: Royal Albert Dock
items.notes: Tate Liverpool, Maritime Museum, bars on the water. Touristy but genuinely great.

items.name: Sefton Park Palm House
items.notes: Victorian glasshouse in Sefton Park, free entry. Sunday afternoon win.

items.name: Crosby Beach — Another Place
items.notes: 100 Antony Gormley iron men staring out to sea. Best at sunset, low tide.

items.name: Port Sunlight Village
items.notes: Model village with 900 listed cottages + Lady Lever Art Gallery. Feels like a film set.

items.name: Hilbre Island
items.notes: Walk across the sands from West Kirby at low tide. Seals sometimes. Check tide times!

items.name: Rupert Lane Recreation Ground, Everton Park
BAAP22 Open land between Irlam Road and the Asda Store
King George V Memorial Playing Fields
William Arnold Silcock Memorial Playing Field
Guinea Gap Baths and Recreation Centre
Seized! The Border and Customs uncovered
Metropolitan Cathedral of Christ the King
Greenfield Valley Rail and Steam Museum
Rivacre Park - Vauxhall Motors Football Club
Heswall Dales and Cleaver Heath Nature Reserve
